---
title: Immanuel J Feld
image: avatar.jpg
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:immanuel.feld@warwick.ac.uk
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/immanuelfeld 
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/immanuelfeld
    - icon: CV
      text: CV
      href: cv/cv.pdf
---

### Bio

Welcome to my website which is still under construction.

I am a PhD candidate in economics at [The University of Warwick](https://warwick.ac.uk/fac/soc/economics/){target="_blank"}. In my research, I'm interested in how to make cities a more inclusive place and in the political economy that affects the supply of public goods.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Education

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

**PhD in Economics, 2026 (expected)** \| University of Warwick

**MRes in Economics, 2022 (with Distinction)** \| University of Warwick

**MA in Economics, 2020** \| University of Zurich

**BSc in Economics and Business Administration, 2018** \| Johann Wolfgang Goethe University, Frankfurt am Main

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Research interests

Urban/Spatial Economics \| Political Economy \| Economic History

------------------------------------------------------------------------
